Kadir Has University on Turkey’s Best Student Experience List

The results of the Turkey University Experience Survey (TÜDA) 2025 conducted by the Council of Higher Education (YÖK) have been announced. Over 264 thousand students from 205 universities participated in the survey, which evaluated the performance of universities in terms of education quality, campus life, support services and many other topics.

We are among the Top 5 Universities in Turkey

As Kadir Has University, we have achieved a great success in the field of student satisfaction and experience. According to TÜDA 2025 results, we ranked among the top 5 universities in Turkey in the categories of Access to Library and Information Resources, Administrative Services, Learning Environment, Institutional Communication and Information, Scientific and Research Supports and Campus Security.

Research-Centered Education Approach

With our research and project-based education approach, we make our students an active part of scientific production. Thanks to FabriKHAS, Technopark collaborations in Silivri and international projects, we offer our students an ecosystem where they can establish both academic and global connections. We take a strong stance in the scientific field with many projects carried out by our academic staff.

A Safe and Modern Campus in the Center of Istanbul

At our campus in the heart of Istanbul, we prioritize the safety of our students with modern security technologies and a 24/7 surveillance system. Our students can continue their social and academic lives in a safe and peaceful environment.

Other Areas in the Top 10

In TÜDA 2025, we were also ranked among the top 10 universities in Turkey in Academic Process and Teaching Quality, Physical Environment and Campus Facilities, Information and Communication Systems, Security and Health Services, Alumni and Career Support Services, and Educational Technologies and Software Support.

This success once again confirms our student-oriented approach, our understanding of quality in higher education and our vision of continuous development.
